name: Wobbly Move
description: Drag transition where the window turns soft and trails behind the pointer, wobbling like jelly and settling with a spring when you let go. The grip area follows the pointer tightly while the far edge lags. Softness, grip and maximum bend are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Softness
parameters.description: How far the body trails behind the motion, in milliseconds of lag

parameters.name: Grip
parameters.description: How tightly the grabbed edge follows the pointer, where higher values keep the top stiffer

parameters.name: Maximum bend
parameters.description: Cap on how far any part of the window may trail (px)
